abstract: The object for specifying the color and location for a color stop in a gradient.
overview:
## Discussion

Use this object for gradients in a [doc://com.apple.applenews/documentation/AppleNewsFormat/LinearGradientFill] style definition.

### Example

items.description: Change the appearance of the backgrounds in your article.

title: ColorStop
